context.description: The text characterizes the body as a dark giant that stands behind us and is too often ignored or diminished to our disadvantage. It frames the body as a powerful, neglected force in relation to consciousness and self-understanding.
normalization_notes: Source language is German; visible prose translated into English.

rows.paragraph_text: The body is a giant. A dark giant that stands behind us and that we are all too happy to ignore and belittle, to our detriment as we will see.
